Combat sport events in 2025
ONE Fight Night 29: Rodrigues vs. McManamon
The poster for ONE Fight Night 29: Rodrigues vs. McManamon
PromotionONE Championship
DateMarch 8, 2025 (2025-03-08)
VenueLumpinee Boxing Stadium
CityBangkok, Thailand
Event chronology
ONE Friday Fights 99: Yod-IQ vs. Morari ONE Fight Night 29: Rodrigues vs. McManamon ONE Friday Fights 100: Muangthai vs. Abdulmedzhidov

ONE Fight Night 29: Rodrigues vs. McManamon was a combat sports event produced by ONE Championship that took place on March 8, 2025, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand.[1][2]

Background

[edit]

A ONE Women's Atomweight Muay Thai World Championship bout between current champion Allycia Rodrigues and Shir Cohen was scheduled to headline the event.[3] However, Cohen withdrew due to suffered as injury and was replaced by promotional newcomer Marie McManamon.[4]

At the weigh-ins, three fighters failed to hydration test and missed weight:[5][6]

  • Parham Gheirati came in at 147.25 pounds, 2.25 pounds over the bantamweight limit and he was fined 30% of purse, which went to Rambolek Chor.Ajalaboon.
  • Soe Lin Oo weighed in at 147.25 pounds, 2.25 pounds over the bantamweight limit and he was fined 20% of purse, which went to Dmitrii Kovtun.
  • Diogo Reis weighed in at 139.75 pounds, 4.75 pounds over the flyweight limit and he was fined 40%, which went to Shoya Ishiguro.

Results

[edit]
Fight card (Amazon Prime Video)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Women's Atomweight Muay Thai Allycia Rodrigues (c) def. Marie McManamon TKO (doctor stoppage) 4 3:00 [a]
Bantamweight Muay Thai Rambolek Chor.Ajalaboon def. Parham Gheirati TKO (punch) 2 1:15 [b]
Bantamweight Muay Thai Dmitrii Kovtun def. Soe Lin Oo Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00 [c]
Light Heavyweight Shamil Erdogan def. Gilberto Galvão TKO (knee and punches) 1 0:41
Bantamweight Enkh-Orgil Baatarkhuu def. Jeremy Pacatiw Decision (unanimous) 3 5:00
Women's Atomweight Muay Thai Martyna Kierczyńska def. Yu Yau Pui Decision (split) 3 3:00
Catchweight (140 lbs) Sanzhar Zakirov def. Eko Roni Saputra KO (punches) 2 1:46
Featherweight Muay Thai Nonthachai Jitmuangnon def. Arian Esparza Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Flyweight Banma Duoji vs. Joshua Pereira NC (overturned) 1 2:13 [d]
Flyweight Submission Grappling Diogo Reis def. Shoya Ishiguro Submission (kimura) 1 6:05 [e]
Catchweight (148 lbs) Muay Thai István Ștefan Kóródi def. Katsuki Kitano Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
  1. ^ For the ONE Women's Atomweight Muay Thai World Championship.
  2. ^ Gheirati missed weight (147.25 lb).
  3. ^ Soe missed weight (147.25 lb).
  4. ^ Originally a TKO (knee injury) win for Banma; overturned after he tested positive for furosemide.[7]
  5. ^ Reis missed weight (139.5 lb).

[8]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses:

  • Performance of the Night: Allycia Rodrigues, Rambolek Chor.Ajalaboon and Shamil Erdogan
